phrases.intent_en: Where is the central waiting room?
phrases.text_local: Consegue dizer onde é a sala de espera central?
phrases.pronunciation: koong-SEH-gih dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih EH AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Central waiting areas are standard in Portuguese terminals for passenger comfort.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica mesmo em frente aos cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh MEHZH-moo AYNG FRAYNG-tih UHOOSH KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's directly opposite the boarding bays.

responses.english: Good morning, it's directly opposite the boarding bays.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh MEHZH-moo AYNG FRAYNG-tih UHOOSH KEYESH.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica mesmo em frente aos cais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a paragem de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-de FI-ka e-za-ta-MEN-te a dji-a pa-RA-zhenj de TA-sheesh
phrases.cultural_note: Locals often ask for precise exits due to busy terminal layout.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica mesmo à saída principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh MEHZH-moo AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's right at the main exit.

responses.english: Good morning, it's right at the main exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh MEHZH-moo AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica mesmo à saída principal.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais número um?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH NOON-mih-roo OONNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform numbers correspond to departure bays along the main concourse.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os cais 1 a 12.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEYESH OOM AH DOH-zih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for platforms 1 to 12.

responses.english: Follow the signs for platforms 1 to 12.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEYESH OOM AH DOH-zih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os cais 1 a 12.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Rede Expressos counter?
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o balcão da Rede Expressos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW bahl-KOWN DUH REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Major operators have dedicated counters near ticketing areas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão Rede Expressos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão Rede Expressos.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de espera central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the central waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the central waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de espera central.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxi ranks are strictly regulated outside main terminal entrances.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a paragem de táxis exterior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the exterior taxi rank.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the exterior taxi rank.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a paragem de táxis exterior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: The taxi rank is clearly outside the terminal, a common setup in Portuguese transport hubs.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no exterior do terminal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR DOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL.

responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR DOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, no exterior do terminal.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the central waiting room?
phrases.text_local: Onde é a sala de espera central?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The central waiting room is a key landmark inside the terminal, easily found.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de espera central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the central waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the central waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh sayngt-RAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de espera central.
